title: Or statements in automations and integrations
excerpt: Something that would be extremely helpful for our use case is the ability to use OR statements in automations and integrations. Currently if we have two triggers for an automation, IE: if date arrives and status is not X…

posts.author: Kyle_Shanley (Kyle Shanley)
posts.cookedHtml: Something that would be extremely helpful for our use case is the ability to use OR statements in automations and integrations. Currently if we have two triggers for an automation, IE: if date arrives and status is not XXX then send email, but we also have a use case where a second status could trigger the same email. To accomplish this we have been using two automations, but have run into the issue where if neither status is triggered we send two emails to the same recipient. The ability to use an or statement would alleviate this pain point.

posts.author: KathleenF (Kathleen Fergus)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree I have a situation where I have multiple automations instead of being able to say if status is x or y send notification etc

posts.author: Ashalyn (Ashley J Spraggs)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this would be super helpful.

posts.author: IsaIsa (Isa)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, my team currently has 50+ automations on a single board that could be condensed to just 10 if we could enable OR statements.

posts.author: kathleenh (Kathleen H)
posts.cookedHtml: agree, please add this to the automations!

posts.author: cdeely (Chris Deely)
posts.cookedHtml: It looks like this is planned for later in 2025 Adding OR & NOT to automations "Builder" - #62

posts.author: Amanda-Ventrella (Amanda Ventrella)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be super helpful instead of having 2+ automations!
